com.jsyn.unitgen

Class GrainSourceSine

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.unitgen.GrainCommon
      • com.jsyn.unitgen.GrainSourceSine
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GrainSource

    public class GrainSourceSine
extends GrainCommon
implements GrainSource
    A simple sine wave generator for a Grain. This uses the same fast Taylor expansion that the SineOscillator uses.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2011 Mobileer Inc
